_doc: Use this template when your gateway issues short-lived JWT tokens (e.g. via HashiCorp Vault, AWS STS, or an internal SSO system). The jwt_helper command is run automatically before each session and its output is used as the Bearer token.
job_description: Backend engineer working on Go microservices and distributed systems
_jwt_examples: aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id llm/key --query SecretString --output text
